nodes.label: Microsoft Indoor Localization Competition Benchmark (2014-2017)
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. The Microsoft Indoor Localization Competition: Experiences and Lessons Learned : IEEE Signa.pdf
nodes.rationale: Standardized competition environment across 4 years (100+ teams) enables direct comparison of heterogeneous indoor localization approaches in realistic, unfamiliar settings, addressing the lack of common evaluation benchmarks in the field.

edges.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. The Microsoft Indoor Localization Competition: Experiences and Lessons Learned : IEEE Signa.pdf
